item.name: Pale Panther
item.description:
A variety of eel with a monochrome pattern covering its body.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: White with black spots, this serpentine wavekin looks like the typical panther might after its observer has pressed their fists to their eyes for some time─an action that naturalists stress is not recommended. While it moves with the speed one would expect of a carnivore, due to its poor eyesight coupled with the near nonexistent light deep below the surface, it is sadly inept at finding prey.
